name: feinai
description: Coordination layer for multi-agent teams — specs, tasks, worktree isolation, live orchestration dashboard

interface.shortDescription: Coordination layer for multi-agent development — specs, tasks, worktrees, live dashboard.
interface.longDescription: feinai solves the coordination overhead of parallel AI agent workflows. Agents claim tasks atomically, work in isolated git worktrees, and report results. Humans watch a live dashboard showing what every agent is doing. Ships with 5 Claude Code skills covering the full SDD lifecycle: write-spec, write-tasks, dispatch, implement.
defaultPrompt: Initialize feinai in this project and create a spec for the next feature.
Show me what tasks are pending and dispatch agents to work on them.
What is each agent currently working on?
